arts.ttl: Power Rankings: The best teams in Europe
arts.sum: Real Madrid's shock defeat to LOSC Lille and Bayern Munich's equally shocking 1-0 defeat to Aston Villa grabbed most of the column space, while some was also saved for Juventus's dramatic win over RB Leipzig too. Borussia Dortmund earn a spot in the rankings this week thanks to their thumping 7-1 win over an in-form Celtic side in the Champions League in midweek.

arts.ttl: Report: What Premier League rivals and insiders have made of Arne Slot's Liverpool start
arts.sum: Liverpool are flying high this season, sitting top of the Premier League and hoping to stay there during the October international break. It has been...

arts.ttl: Liverpool have found the player they want to replace inconsistent Szoboszlai
arts.sum: Things haven’t gone as well as could be expected for Dominik Szoboszlai at Liverpool, with the Reds now targeting a highly-rated exponent as his replacement. According to transfermarkt, he hasn’t scored for Arne Slot in six Premier League matches so far, but does have one in the Champions League. Just one goal in eight total […] The post Liverpool have found the player they want to replace inconsistent Szoboszlai appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: PLAY TEAMSHEET: Can YOU remember the Liverpool team that blew a 3-0 lead against Crystal Palace during the title run-in 10 years ago?
arts.sum: Every day we'll challenge you to name a different starting XI from the Premier League era. We'll give you a team's rough formation, and the number of letters in each player's name. Then it's up to you!

arts.ttl: Liverpool, Man City 'send scouts' to watch 22-year-old playmaker
arts.sum: Liverpool and Manchester City reportedly track Georgiy Sudakov, who has made a strong start to the season for Shakhtar Donetsk.

arts.ttl: Doubts appearing around 2023 Liverpool signing as Reds keen on England international
arts.sum: Doubt seems to be creeping in around Dominik Szoboszlai at Liverpool as the Reds are believed to be keen on signing Crystal Palace’s Eberechi Eze to take over the 23-year-old’s role in Arne Slot’s team. The Hungary international was brought to Anfied last summer as part of a £60m deal with RB Leipzig and given […] The post Doubts appearing around 2023 Liverpool signing as Reds keen on England international appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Liverpool ace soon to be out of contract is already in discussions with new club
arts.sum: The next few months are going to be vital for Arne Slot and Liverpool, as not only do they need to keep winning on the pitch, but they need to sort the contract situations for Mo Salah, Virgil van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold.
